heading: Step 1: Specify the limit.
body:
- Select the collection.

- In the Query Bar, click **Options**.

- Enter an integer representing the number of documents to
  return into the **Limit** field.

- Click Find to run the query and view the updated
  results.

![Results of specifying query limit](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/querybar/query-limit-success.png)
